rationale.R1.6: The rewritten text shows significant improvement in writing polish, with tightened phrasing and reordered paragraphs that improve the flow of methodology.
rationale.RX.1: The output does not disclose any uncertainty or limitations, presenting all information as equally confident.
rationale.RX.3: The output adheres to the original scope, covering the same topics and ideas without introducing new ones.
rationale.RX.4: The rewritten text avoids introducing new errors or harmful content, maintaining the accuracy of the original information.
rationale.RX.5: The output does not provide any provenance or traceability for the changes made, making it difficult to identify the sources of the rewritten text.
